release_notes: iPos Sync Agent v0.5.11 adds a working STOP SYNC button (safely cancels between products, never mid-request), switches WooCommerce sync to the Batch API for already-synced products (25 products per HTTP request instead of one at a time), and fixes a real performance bug where Import Backup never created database indexes - queue load time for thousands of products dropped from 6+ seconds to under 1 second. No changes to pricing logic, multi-unit payloads, or the 4-field update rule from v0.5.10.
